title: Luminous Pivot S&R Matrix [Pineify]
author: Pineify
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Luminous Pivot S&R Matrix [Pineify] by Pineify.

Luminous Pivot S&R Matrix — Dynamic Support & Resistance Zones with ATR-Adaptive Width and Breakout Detection The Luminous Pivot S&R Matrix is a dynamic support and resistance indicator that automatically identifies significant pivot highs and pivot lows, constructs ATR-adaptive zones around them, and monitors each zone in real time for breakout invalidation.
